summary: Horizontal video, a Fox News 'Special Report' segment with a FOX NEWS ALERT banner. Anchor Harris Faulkner interviews DHS Asst. Sec. Tricia McLaughlin, who appears remotely before a U.S. flag and DHS seal and speaks against claims that innocent people were swept up in alleged gang-member deportations and speaks in support of DHS intelligence assessments. B-roll shows ICE and HSI agents making arrests and an armored vehicle in Aurora and Denver, CO. The audio is the anchor and official talking with news lower-thirds and no music.
notable_text: ASST DHS SEC REBUTS CLAIMS INNOCENT PEOPLE SWEPT UP IN ALLEGED GANG MEMBER DEPORTATIONS; TRICIA MCLAUGHLIN | DHS ASST SEC FOR PUBLIC AFFAIRS; NOEM VISITS LATIN AMERICA TO TALK CRIME, MIGRATION; POLICE ICE; FOX NEWS ALERT
